summary: This is an extremely brief status update where Joel announces his return from a break and mentions being overwhelmed by accumulated email. There is no substantive argument or technical content. It serves purely as a placeholder post signaling his presence back on the blog.
key_points: Joel returned from an absence and posted a minimal update
Email backlog is referenced as the main challenge upon return
money_quotes: I'm back! … still trying to dig out from under a big pile o' email.
key_insight: This is a trivial status update with no substantive content to analyze.
